rulings.Case Title: JAMES FAHEY VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff James Fahey'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response To Form Interrogatories, Set One
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2019 line 1. Plaintiff James Fahey'S Motion To Compel Further Response To Form Interrogatories, Set One DENIED. Motion is untimely. Professional Career Colleges, Magna Institute v. Superior Court (1989) 207 Cal.App.3d 490, 494. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES FAHEY VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.

rulings.Case Title: JOHN BRITTON ET AL VS. JOSE JUAN RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Mandatory Order Vacating Order Granting Mtn For Summary Judgment Based On Attorney'S Fault And Req. For New Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFFs JOHN BRITTON, and W.J. BRITTON & CO., INC.'s Motion For Mandatory Order Vacating Order Granting Mtn For Summary Judgment Based On Attorney'S Fault And Req. For New Hearing GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment shall be heard on February 15, 2019. Plaintiff to deliver courtesy copies of the previously filed moving papers and opposition with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than February 5, 2019. Defendant shall file a reply, if any, no later than February 11, 2019. The Court notes that Plaintiff's motion was filed at 10:23 a.m. on January 29, 2019 and not as ordered by the Court (January 28, 2019; drop boxes are available for filing in room 103 from 2:00 p.m. until close of business). Plaintiff also filed a reply in violation of the OST order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DONNA CHO VS. EVAN CHAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT EVAN CHAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. SFRO 37.9(j)(3) requirements are mandatory and non-fact specific. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Plaintiff is excused from providing the requisite notice if Plaintiff thinks (based on facts or subjective belief) that Defendants do not fall into the protected category. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ASIAN INC VS. CARL H SAXEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT CARL SAXEN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with 10-day leave to amend. Non-opposition filed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SETH WHITAKER VS. ROBERT MINKOFF ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT BOB MINKOFF's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint is not uncertain. Plaintiff's allegations regarding unavailability of attorney's fees and the basis for these allegations are clearly stated. There is nothing uncertain about Plaintiff's position. Whether this position is legally supported is not a question that can be addressed on a demurrer based on uncertainty. (See Notice of Demurrer). = (501/CFH)
